message:
feat(connectors): add 11 new connector scaffolds

Add initial connector scaffolds with Cargo.toml, manifest.toml, and
src/ for 11 new platform integrations:

Messaging/Communication:
- bluebubbles: BlueBubbles iMessage bridge connector, reusing the
  iMessage connector's BlueBubblesConnector with a distinct connector
  ID (fcp.bluebubbles).
- dingtalk: DingTalk (China enterprise messaging) connector scaffold
  with tenant-scoped bot messaging operations.
- qq: Tencent QQ bot connector scaffold with group and private message
  operations via QQ Bot API.
- synology-chat: Synology Chat connector for self-hosted NAS messaging
  with incoming/outgoing webhook support.
- wecom: WeCom (WeChat Work) enterprise connector scaffold with
  application-scoped messaging operations.
- email-generic: Generic IMAP/SMTP email connector scaffold supporting
  read, send, list, and search operations.

Smart Home/IoT:
- hue: Philips Hue smart lighting connector with light state control,
  group management, and scene activation operations.
- sonos: Sonos speaker connector with playback control, group management,
  and favorites operations via Sonos Cloud API.

Productivity:
- apple-notes: Apple Notes connector using AppleScript bridge for
  local note CRUD operations on macOS.
- apple-reminders: Apple Reminders connector using AppleScript bridge
  for local reminder management on macOS.

Location:
- google-places: Google Places API (New) connector with place search,
  details, nearby search, and autocomplete operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+name = "fcp-apple-notes"
+description = "macOS Apple Notes connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"

+edition.workspace = true

+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+

+name = "fcp_apple_notes"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-apple-notes"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+fcp-sdk = { path = "../../crates/fcp-sdk" }
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }

+hex.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,66 @@
+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.apple-notes"
+name = "Apple Notes"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "macOS-local Apple Notes connector for note inventory, note search, note retrieval, and note creation"
+archetype = "local"
+homepage = "https://support.apple.com/guide/notes/welcome/mac"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:owner"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:owner", "z:private"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-owner"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = []
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["network.listen", "network.outbound", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Report Apple Notes connector health and platform support"
+capability = "apple_notes.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.list_notes]
+summary = "List Apple Notes note summaries"
+capability = "apple_notes.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.search_notes]
+summary = "Search Apple Notes by title/body substring"
+capability = "apple_notes.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.get_note]
+summary = "Get one Apple Note by note identifier"
+capability = "apple_notes.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.create_note]
+summary = "Create a new Apple Note"
+capability = "apple_notes.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 64
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = false
+deny_ptrace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+//! Apple Notes connector.
+
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+#![allow(
+    clippy::missing_errors_doc,
+    clippy::must_use_candidate,
+    clippy::struct_field_names,
+    clippy::too_many_lines
+)]
+
+pub mod client;
+pub mod connector;
+pub mod error;
+pub mod types;
+
+pub use connector::AppleNotesConnector;
+

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.bluebubbles"
+name = "BlueBubbles"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Dedicated BlueBubbles bridge connector for iMessage-compatible chat, message, and attachment workflows"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://bluebubbles.app"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:private"
+allowed_sources = ["z:private"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:private"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-private"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.send_message]
+summary = "Send a message through BlueBubbles"
+capability = "imessage.send"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.send_message.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]
+port_allow = [1234]
+require_tls = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.send_message.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to send an iMessage through a local BlueBubbles bridge"
+
+[provides.operations.get_chats]
+summary = "List BlueBubbles chats"
+capability = "imessage.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.get_chats.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]
+port_allow = [1234]
+require_tls = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.get_chats.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to browse or search bridge-exposed chats"
+
+[provides.operations.get_chat]
+summary = "Get one BlueBubbles chat"
+capability = "imessage.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.get_chat.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]
+port_allow = [1234]
+require_tls = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.get_chat.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need metadata for a single BlueBubbles chat"
+
+[provides.operations.get_messages]
+summary = "Get messages from a BlueBubbles chat"
+capability = "imessage.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.get_messages.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]
+port_allow = [1234]
+require_tls = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.get_messages.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to read recent message history from a bridge chat"
+
+[provides.operations.sync_events]
+summary = "Sync BlueBubbles events"
+capability = "imessage.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.sync_events.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]
+port_allow = [1234]
+require_tls = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.sync_events.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need a polling-friendly view of bridge activity"
+
+[provides.operations.download_attachment]
+summary = "Download a BlueBubbles attachment"
+capability = "imessage.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.download_attachment.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]
+port_allow = [1234]
+require_tls = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.download_attachment.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need attachment bytes for a bridge-backed message"
+
+[provides.operations.mark_read]
+summary = "Mark a bridge chat as read"
+capability = "imessage.send"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations.mark_read.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]
+port_allow = [1234]
+require_tls = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.mark_read.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you want to mark a bridge-exposed conversation as read"
+
+[provides.operations.get_server_info]
+summary = "Get BlueBubbles server info"
+capability = "imessage.admin"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.get_server_info.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["localhost", "127.0.0.1"]
+port_allow = [1234]
+require_tls = false
+deny_private_ranges = false
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.get_server_info.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to confirm the local BlueBubbles bridge is reachable"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 64
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.dingtalk"
+name = "DingTalk Enterprise Robot"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Tenant-scoped DingTalk robot connector for DM or group sends, link or file delivery, media upload, and health verification"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://open.dingtalk.com/"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work", "z:project:*"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work", "z:project:*"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged", "network.listen"]
+
+[provides.operations.messages_send_text]
+summary = "Send a DingTalk text or markdown message"
+capability = "dingtalk.messages.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.messages_send_link]
+summary = "Send a DingTalk link message"
+capability = "dingtalk.messages.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.messages_send_file]
+summary = "Send a DingTalk file message with a prior media_id"
+capability = "dingtalk.messages.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.media_upload]
+summary = "Upload media to DingTalk"
+capability = "dingtalk.media.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Verify DingTalk credentials and token issuance"
+capability = "dingtalk.health.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 30
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

+

+

+
+pub use connector::DingTalkConnector;

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.email-generic"
+name = "Generic Email"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Generic email connector covering IMAP mailbox inventory/search and SMTP message sending"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3501"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:private"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:private", "z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-private"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged", "network.listen"]
+
+# IMAP and SMTP hosts are operator-configured and may point at public, private,
+# or tailnet infrastructure, so the host allowlist is intentionally deferred to
+# runtime configuration.
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Report connector configuration and IMAP reachability"
+capability = "email_generic.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.list_mailboxes]
+summary = "List IMAP mailboxes"
+capability = "email_generic.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.search_messages]
+summary = "Search IMAP messages and return matching UIDs"
+capability = "email_generic.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.send_message]
+summary = "Send an email through SMTP"
+capability = "email_generic.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+//! Error types for the generic email connector.
+
+use fcp_core::FcpError;
+use thiserror::Error;
+
+#[derive(Debug, Error)]
+pub enum EmailGenericError {
+    #[error("configuration error: {0}")]
+    Config(String),
+
+    #[error("imap error: {0}")]
+    Imap(String),
+
+    #[error("smtp error: {0}")]
+    Smtp(String),
+
+    #[error("io error: {0}")]
+    Io(#[from] std::io::Error),
+
+    #[error("tls error: {0}")]
+    Tls(#[from] native_tls::Error),
+
+    #[error("address error: {0}")]
+    Address(String),
+}
+
+pub type EmailGenericResult<T> = Result<T, EmailGenericError>;
+
+impl EmailGenericError {
+    #[must_use]
+    pub fn to_fcp_error(&self) -> FcpError {
+        match self {
+            Self::Config(message) => FcpError::InvalidRequest {
+                code: 1003,
+                message: message.clone(),
+            },
+            Self::Imap(message) | Self::Smtp(message) => FcpError::External {
+                service: "email_generic".into(),
+                message: message.clone(),
+                status_code: None,
+                retryable: false,
+                retry_after: None,
+            },
+            Self::Io(error) => FcpError::External {
+                service: "email_generic".into(),
+                message: error.to_string(),
+                status_code: None,
+                retryable: true,
+                retry_after: None,
+            },
+            Self::Tls(error) | Self::Address(error) => FcpError::Internal {
+                message: error.to_string(),
+            },
+        }
+    }
+}
+

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.google-places"
+name = "Google Places"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Google Places API (New) connector for text search, autocomplete, place details, and read-only health checks"
+archetype = "read-only"
+homepage = "https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/places/web-service"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:private"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:private", "z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-private"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged", "network.listen"]
+
+[provides.operations.search_text]
+summary = "Search for places by free-form text query"
+capability = "google_places.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.search_text.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["places.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.search_text.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need a ranked set of places for a natural-language query"
+
+[provides.operations.autocomplete]
+summary = "Get autocomplete predictions for an in-progress place query"
+capability = "google_places.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.autocomplete.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["places.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.autocomplete.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you want suggestion-style place predictions before selecting a specific place"
+
+[provides.operations.get_place]
+summary = "Get details for a single place resource"
+capability = "google_places.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.get_place.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["places.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.get_place.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you already know a place resource name and need structured details"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Report Google Places connector configuration and upstream target"
+capability = "google_places.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.health.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["places.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.health.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to confirm the connector is configured for the Google Places API"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 64
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+

+[connector]

+
+[zones]
+home = "z:owner"

+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-home"
+
+[capabilities]

+optional = []

+
+# Hue bridges are local-network resources chosen at configuration time, so the

+

+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+//! Error types for the Hue connector.
+
+use fcp_core::FcpError;
+use thiserror::Error;
+
+#[derive(Debug, Error)]
+pub enum HueError {
+    #[error("configuration error: {0}")]
+    Config(String),
+
+    #[error("http error: {0}")]
+    Http(#[from] reqwest::Error),
+
+    #[error("api error: status={status}, message={message}")]
+    Api { status: u16, message: String },
+
+    #[error("json error: {0}")]
+    Json(#[from] serde_json::Error),
+}
+
+pub type HueResult<T> = Result<T, HueError>;
+
+impl HueError {
+    #[must_use]
+    pub fn to_fcp_error(&self) -> FcpError {
+        match self {
+            Self::Config(message) => FcpError::InvalidRequest {
+                code: 1003,
+                message: message.clone(),
+            },
+            Self::Http(error) if error.is_timeout() => FcpError::UpstreamTimeout {
+                service: "hue".into(),
+            },
+            Self::Http(error) => FcpError::External {
+                service: "hue".into(),
+                message: error.to_string(),
+                status_code: None,
+                retryable: error.is_connect() || error.is_timeout(),
+                retry_after: None,
+            },
+            Self::Api { status, message } => FcpError::External {
+                service: "hue".into(),
+                message: message.clone(),
+                status_code: Some(*status),
+                retryable: matches!(status, 429 | 500 | 502 | 503 | 504),
+                retry_after: None,
+            },
+            Self::Json(error) => FcpError::Internal {
+                message: format!("Failed to decode Hue response: {error}"),
+            },
+        }
+    }
+}
+

+//! Error types for the Sonos connector.
+
+use fcp_core::FcpError;
+use thiserror::Error;
+
+#[derive(Debug, Error)]
+pub enum SonosError {
+    #[error("configuration error: {0}")]
+    Config(String),
+
+    #[error("http error: {0}")]
+    Http(#[from] reqwest::Error),
+
+    #[error("api error: status={status}, message={message}")]
+    Api { status: u16, message: String },
+
+    #[error("parse error: {0}")]
+    Parse(String),
+}
+
+pub type SonosResult<T> = Result<T, SonosError>;
+
+impl SonosError {
+    #[must_use]
+    pub fn to_fcp_error(&self) -> FcpError {
+        match self {
+            Self::Config(message) => FcpError::InvalidRequest {
+                code: 1003,
+                message: message.clone(),
+            },
+            Self::Http(error) if error.is_timeout() => FcpError::UpstreamTimeout {
+                service: "sonos".into(),
+            },
+            Self::Http(error) => FcpError::External {
+                service: "sonos".into(),
+                message: error.to_string(),
+                status_code: None,
+                retryable: error.is_connect() || error.is_timeout(),
+                retry_after: None,
+            },
+            Self::Api { status, message } => FcpError::External {
+                service: "sonos".into(),
+                message: message.clone(),
+                status_code: Some(*status),
+                retryable: matches!(status, 429 | 500 | 502 | 503 | 504),
+                retry_after: None,
+            },
+            Self::Parse(message) => FcpError::Internal {
+                message: message.clone(),
+            },
+        }
+    }
+}
+

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.synology-chat"
+name = "Synology Chat"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Synology Chat incoming-webhook connector for self-hosted chat delivery and health checks"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://www.synology.com"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work", "z:project:*"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work", "z:project:*"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged", "network.listen"]
+
+# Synology Chat deployments are operator-configured and may live on public,
+# private, or tailnet addresses, so host-level constraints are intentionally
+# left to runtime configuration instead of being hardcoded here.
+
+[provides.operations.send_message]
+summary = "Send a Synology Chat message through an incoming webhook"
+capability = "synology_chat.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.send_message.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to deliver a chat message into a Synology Chat webhook target"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Report Synology Chat connector configuration and delivery target"
+capability = "synology_chat.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.health.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to confirm the Synology Chat connector is configured"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 64
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
+

@@ -0,0 +1,54 @@
+//! Error types for the Synology Chat connector.
+
+use fcp_core::FcpError;
+use thiserror::Error;
+
+#[derive(Debug, Error)]
+pub enum SynologyChatError {
+    #[error("configuration error: {0}")]
+    Config(String),
+
+    #[error("http error: {0}")]
+    Http(#[from] reqwest::Error),
+
+    #[error("api error: status={status}, message={message}")]
+    Api { status: u16, message: String },
+
+    #[error("json error: {0}")]
+    Json(#[from] serde_json::Error),
+}
+
+pub type SynologyChatResult<T> = Result<T, SynologyChatError>;
+
+impl SynologyChatError {
+    #[must_use]
+    pub fn to_fcp_error(&self) -> FcpError {
+        match self {
+            Self::Config(message) => FcpError::InvalidRequest {
+                code: 1003,
+                message: message.clone(),
+            },
+            Self::Http(error) if error.is_timeout() => FcpError::UpstreamTimeout {
+                service: "synology_chat".into(),
+            },
+            Self::Http(error) => FcpError::External {
+                service: "synology_chat".into(),
+                message: error.to_string(),
+                status_code: None,
+                retryable: error.is_connect() || error.is_timeout(),
+                retry_after: None,
+            },
+            Self::Api { status, message } => FcpError::External {
+                service: "synology_chat".into(),
+                message: message.clone(),
+                status_code: Some(*status),
+                retryable: matches!(status, 429 | 500 | 502 | 503 | 504),
+                retry_after: None,
+            },
+            Self::Json(error) => FcpError::Internal {
+                message: format!("Failed to decode Synology Chat response: {error}"),
+            },
+        }
+    }
+}
+

+)]

@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.wecom"
+name = "WeCom Enterprise Messaging"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Tenant-scoped WeCom connector for enterprise bot messaging, media upload, directory lookups, and health verification"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://developer.work.weixin.qq.com/"
+
+# Auth and scope model:
+# - One connector instance is bound to one WeCom tenant application.
+# - Authentication uses `corp_id`, `agent_id`, and `agent_secret`.
+# - The connector acts as the configured enterprise application; user impersonation,
+#   callback verification, and inbound webhook or websocket delivery are explicit non-goals
+#   for this first slice.
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work", "z:project:*"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work", "z:project:*"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound", "network.tls.sni"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged", "network.listen"]
+
+[provides.operations.messages_send_text]
+summary = "Send a WeCom text message"
+capability = "wecom.messages.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.messages_send_markdown]
+summary = "Send a WeCom markdown message"
+capability = "wecom.messages.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.media_upload]
+summary = "Upload temporary media to WeCom"
+capability = "wecom.media.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations.users_get]
+summary = "Fetch a WeCom user profile"
+capability = "wecom.users.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.departments_list]
+summary = "List WeCom departments"
+capability = "wecom.departments.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Verify WeCom credentials and token issuance"
+capability = "wecom.health.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 96
+cpu_percent = 30
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true
